diff:
+++ b/balances.py
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+def rebalance(db, a, b, cents):
+    db.execute("UPDATE accounts SET balance = balance - ? WHERE id = ?", (cents, a))
+    db.execute("UPDATE accounts SET balance = balance + ? WHERE id = ?", (cents, b))
+    audit.record("rebalance", a, b, cents)

+++ b/orders.go
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+func fulfill(db, id int) {
+    db.Exec("UPDATE ledger SET amt = amt - 1 WHERE id = 1")
+    db.Exec("UPDATE accounts SET bal = bal + 1 WHERE id = 2")
+    audit.Log("fulfill")
+}

+++ b/post.py
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+db.execute("INSERT INTO ledger (side, amount) VALUES ('debit', ?)", (amt,))
+audit.record("post", amt)
